name: Atsuko Okatsuka
blurb: Her 2022 HBO debut The Intruder was named one of the years best specials, and she is the creator of the viral Drop Challenge.
bio: Atsuko Okatsuka is an American stand-up comedian, actress and writer of Taiwanese and Japanese heritage, known for an absurdist, personal style. Her 2022 HBO debut The Intruder was named one of the years best specials, and she is the creator of the viral Drop Challenge.

timeline.ev: Begins performing stand-up in Los Angeles
Goes viral performing through a live earthquake
Named a Variety Top 10 Comic to Watch; HBO debut The Intruder
The Intruder wins Best Comedy Special at the Gracie Awards
Releases second special Father on Hulu

accolades: Gracie Award, Best Comedy Special (The Intruder)
Second Asian-American woman with a stand-up special on HBO

bits.t: On Renting vs. Owning A Home

bits.yt_title: Atsuko Okatsuka On Renting vs. Owning A Home | Atsuko Okatsuka: The Intruder | HBO
